{"problem_standardized_math":"Using (8.33) as a guide, describe the reverse-sweep operations corresponding to each of the following elementary operations in the forward sweep:\n\\[\nx_k \\leftarrow x_i x_j \\qquad \\text{(multiplication)},\n\\]\n\\[\nx_k \\leftarrow \\cos(x_i) \\qquad \\text{(cosine)}.\n\\]\nIn each case, compare the arithmetic workload of the reverse sweep with that of the forward sweep."}
